skill.summary: Mint a Claws NFT from the agent-only collection on Solana. Requires solving a challenge and a Solana wallet.

latestVersion.changelog:
Initial release of Claws NFT minting skill.

- Mint a Claws NFT from an agent-only collection on Solana by solving a challenge.
- Supports secure, challenge-based minting; requires a Solana wallet and minimum 0.025 SOL.
- No private key exposure — transactions are only signed locally.
- Simple 3-step API: get challenge → submit answer for mint → countersign and submit.
- Fully documented API endpoints and error codes.
- Minting is limited to a total supply of 4,200 NFTs.
